calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Charles M. Collins, Esq., for the Plaintiff Flora Huang.
Flora Huang sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Regina Shtauber.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1039 Plymouth Avenue, Lower Unit, San Francisco, CA 94112.
Past-due rent $2,550.00
Holdover damages $651.59
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $340.00
Other: Les security deposit $400.00
for a Total Judgment of $3,141.59
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Flora Huang is present.
Attorney Charles Michael Collins for the plaintiff.
Defendant Regina Shtauber is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Dec. 23, 2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
